subcodes.first_line: O thou who art stirred by the breezes of divine favors in this Most Great Resurrection, wherein the services rendered unto the Ancient Beauty have set the heart of the world in motion [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مهتز از نسایم الطاف در این حشر اعظم که خدمات جمال قدم قلب عالمرا بحرکت
subcodes.subjects: @forces of light and darkness; integration and disintegration, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @predictions and prophecies
